message.abstract: <jats:p>Lower respiratory tract symptoms during seasonal coronavirus infections in children are associated with RSV co-detection and increased levels of Haemophilus and Fusobacterium species.</jats:p>
title: Symptomatology during seasonal coronavirus infections in children is associated with viral and bacterial co-detection
